name: DNC War Room
subject: Here is what's next on health care:
body:
We must kick these guys out of office. **House Republicans passed their bill to repeal the Affordable Care Act. Help us raise $100,000 to throw them out of office -- chip in $10 or more today and get your donation matched.
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf77/4067b0a/2fdd15198/7e7778da/1147517772/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Health-Care-Vote-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170506_dnc_rem&source=em_20170506_dnc_rem&refcode=em_20170506_dnc_rem")****

Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf77/4067b0a/2fdd15198/7e7778f3/1147517772/VEsEAw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=26+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170506_dnc_rem&source=em_20170506_dnc_rem&refcode=em_20170506_dnc_rem"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf77/4067b0a/2fdd15198/7e7778f0/1147517772/VEsEAg/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=27+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170506_dnc_rem&source=em_20170506_dnc_rem&refcode=em_20170506_dnc_rem") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf77/4067b0a/2fdd15198/7e7778f1/1147517772/VEsEDQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=28+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170506_dnc_rem&source=em_20170506_dnc_rem&refcode=em_20170506_dnc_rem"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Jessica O'Connell, EMILY's List
subject: My last email (at least for a little while)
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7861/24c69fd9/ec28db60/18e598dc/1908448206/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE508N_digital_email_20170506_JOCFarewell_inact&source=WQEFE508N_digital_email_20170506_JOCFarewell_inact")
---

Peter,

After I left EMILY's List in 2005, I always suspected I might come back.

And now, as I wrap up my second stint, I wouldn't rule out returning again.

The reason is simple. There is something truly special about this community -- one I'm proud to have seen grow from three to five million people strong in my three years here.

This community is the one you want in your corner for the tough fights, whether you're a former Harvard professor taking on a popular Republican incumbent in Massachusetts, trying to break the Senate glass ceiling for Latinas, or even running for president.

And this community never fails to rise to the occasion. I'm so incredibly proud that we raised a combined $90 million for our candidates last cycle -- resources that helped elect four new women to the Senate and eight new women to the House, including nine women of color.

The presidential election was heartbreaking for me, as it was for all of us. But the energy after the election, from the millions of women who marched the day after the inauguration to the more than 12,000 women who've reached out to EMILY's List about running for office, has been a tonic for me. The resistance is strong, and EMILY's List will continue to play a critical role in it.

So as I finish up my tenure as executive director, I wanted to make sure I said one thing directly to this community with heartfelt gratitude:

Thank you.

We haven't won every battle. But we have never, ever let the fear of failure stop us from giving our all.

**And in the spirit of EMILY's List, I leave you with one final ask -- keep giving it your all, and chip in a little to keep the fight going:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Keep-Fighting](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7861/24c69fd9/ec28db60/18e598dd/1908448206/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170505_email_JOCFarewell?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgKeepFighting&utm_campaign=WQEFE508N_digital_email_20170506_JOCFarewell_inact&source=WQEFE508N_digital_email_20170506_JOCFarewell_inact")**

It's been a pleasure to lead this community which inspires me every single day. Keep fighting.

Thank you,

Jess O'Connell
Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7861/24c69fd9/ec28db60/18e598de/1908448206/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170505_email_JOCFarewell?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WQEFE508N_digital_email_20170506_JOCFarewell_inact&source=WQEFE508N_digital_email_20170506_JOCFarewell_inact")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7861/24c69fd9/ec28db60/18e598df/1908448206/VEsC/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQEFE508N_digital_email_20170506_JOCFarewell_inact&source=WQEFE508N_digital_email_20170506_JOCFarewell_inact") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7861/24c69fd9/ec28db60/18e598d8/1908448206/VEsD/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE508N_digital_email_20170506_JOCFarewell_inact&source=WQEFE508N_digital_email_20170506_JOCFarewell_inact"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7861/24c69fd9/ec28db60/18e598d9/1908448206/VEsA/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE508N_digital_email_20170506_JOCFarewell_inact&source=WQEFE508N_digital_email_20170506_JOCFarewell_inact"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: The costs are too great [sign on]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Join your voice with mine and 11 other governors' urging Trump to make the right decision.

| [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTA5NjMxMjkS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE2MDQ3Njg3MgS2&mt=1&rt=0) Dear Friend, No matter how hard we work in Washington, it is going to take all of us to truly protect our Earth from further damage. The dire reality is that President Trump is threatening to pull out of the Paris climate agreement -- an international agreement to work to fight climate change. This would be devastating for America, not to mention people across the planet. If we don't care for our Earth, if we don't work to reduce greenhouse gases, if we are not creative and dogged in our solutions for a cleaner world, the sad truth is our children and grandchildren will be forced to see the consequences. So, now, he has a very important decision to make: Will the U.S. continue to be a world leader in the 21st century, or will it cede that leadership to nations such as China and India? I and 11 of my fellow governors from across the country encourage him to make the right choice -- and that is why we sent a letter to President Trump this week urging him to continue its involvement in the Paris climate agreement. But we need more voices. In order for President Trump to understand what an enormous loss it would be to stop combatting climate change, we need you to chime in. So, I'm asking you to join these governors and myself as a citizen signer to our letter -- let's make this something he can't ignore. [**Read our letter and join me in telling President Trump: The costs are too great to abandon our fight against climate change!**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTA5NjMxMjkS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE2MDQ3Njg3MgS2&mt=1&rt=0) Thank you for joining us today. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [SIGN ON »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTA5NjMxMjkS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE2MDQ3Njg3MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://www.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?m=10963129&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&j=MTE2MDQ3Njg3MgS2&l=6586026&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). Contributions or gifts to Jay Inslee for Washington are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
---
All content (C) Jay Inslee for Washington, All Rights Reserved
PO Box 21067, Seattle, WA 98111
[Privacy Policy](http://www.jayinslee.com/privacy)

The dire reality is that President Trump is threatening to pull out of the Paris climate agreement -- an international agreement to work to fight climate change. This would be devastating for America, not to mention people across the planet. If we don't care for our Earth, if we don't work to reduce greenhouse gases, if we are not creative and dogged in our solutions for a cleaner world, the sad truth is our children and grandchildren will be forced to see the consequences. So, now, he has a very important decision to make: Will the U.S. continue to be a world leader in the 21st century, or will it cede that leadership to nations such as China and India? I and 11 of my fellow governors from across the country encourage him to make the right choice -- and that is why we sent a letter to President Trump this week urging him to continue its involvement in the Paris climate agreement. But we need more voices. In order for President Trump to understand what an enormous loss it would be to stop combatting climate change, we need you to chime in. So, I'm asking you to join these governors and myself as a citizen signer to our letter -- let's make this something he can't ignore. Thank you for joining us today. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee |

name: Al Franken
subject: Outraged? Good.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
It's not enough to get outraged -- we need to get organized. Because Trumpcare is now coming to the Senate, and we need to fight like hell to stop it.
---
[****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170506-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Team,

On Thursday, Republicans in the House passed an unimaginably cruel health care bill that would destroy the lives of millions of people just so that a few super-rich guys could get a tax cut. Then they got on party buses and went to the White House to celebrate with President Trump.

Outraged? Good. Me, too. But it's not enough to get outraged -- we need to get organized. Because Trumpcare is now coming to the Senate, and we need to fight like hell to stop it.

[**Ready to fight? Show it by clicking here and making a contribution to stop the Republicans!**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170506-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

If this bill becomes law, millions of people with pre-existing conditions -- like cancer, heart disease, and get this, even pregnancy -- could be discriminated against by the insurance companies, millions more would outright lose their insurance and their economic security, and some may even lose their lives.

But getting outraged won't stop it. Only getting organized will.

Here's what we Democratic senators are going to do: We're going to stand up and speak out. We're going to expose exactly how bad this bill is and exactly how many people will be hurt. We're going to amplify the stories of real Americans whose health care would be stripped away so that Republicans can give a huge tax break to millionaires and billionaires.

And then, when this monstrosity comes up for a vote, we're going to stand shoulder-to-shoulder to vote against it.

**Here 's what we need YOU to do: Get our backs -- by talking to people in your community, making non-stop calls, and [donating to help make any Republican who votes for this thing regret it forever.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170506-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

This is a critical moment for seniors, people with disabilities, women, and anyone who has ever had cancer, diabetes, asthma or other pre-existing conditions -- pretty much everyone who isn't in the top one percent. It's up to us to protect them.

Thanks,
Al

clean_body: It's not enough to get outraged -- we need to get organized. Because Trumpcare is now coming to the Senate, and we need to fight like hell to stop it. "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" Team, On Thursday, Republicans in the House passed an unimaginably cruel health care bill that would destroy the lives of millions of people just so that a few super-rich guys could get a tax cut. Then they got on party buses and went to the White House to celebrate with President Trump. Outraged? Good. Me, too. But it's not enough to get outraged -- we need to get organized. Because Trumpcare is now coming to the Senate, and we need to fight like hell to stop it. "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" If this bill becomes law, millions of people with pre-existing conditions -- like cancer, heart disease, and get this, even pregnancy -- could be discriminated against by the insurance companies, millions more would outright lose their insurance and their economic security, and some may even lose their lives. But getting outraged won't stop it. Only getting organized will. Here's what we Democratic senators are going to do: We're going to stand up and speak out. We're going to expose exactly how bad this bill is and exactly how many people will be hurt. We're going to amplify the stories of real Americans whose health care would be stripped away so that Republicans can give a huge tax break to millionaires and billionaires. And then, when this monstrosity comes up for a vote, we're going to stand shoulder-to-shoulder to vote against it. Here 's what we need YOU to do: Get our backs -- by talking to people in your community, making non-stop calls, and "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" This is a critical moment for seniors, people with disabilities, women, and anyone who has ever had cancer, diabetes, asthma or other pre-existing conditions -- pretty much everyone who isn't in the top one percent. It's up to us to protect them. name: mindy@dscc.org
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
The only thing standing between us and Trumpcare becoming the law of the land is our Democratic senators
---
[****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170506-Myers-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Friends --

In just a few moments, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to support Democratic senators gearing up for the big fight to protect Obamacare. But before I get there, it's worth explaining why this request is so important in this particular moment.

217-212. That was the margin of Thursday's vote. But now the bill is out of the House's hands and onto the chamber where Republicans have a much slimmer margin... the U.S. Senate.

Now, there are a lot of Democratic senators up for re-election this cycle. And over the next few weeks, they are going to be doing everything they can to stop Republican efforts to repeal Obamacare. And while they do that, it's up to us to have their backs.

Because right now, the only thing standing between us and Trumpcare becoming the law of the land is those Democratic senators, and what people across the country are willing to do to support them. That's why I am asking:

[**Can I count on you to chip in $1 right now to support the Democratic senators on the front lines of the fight to protect Obamacare?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170506-Myers-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Stopping this bill is going to take people across the country coming together and taking action to make their voices heard.

That means every single phone call, tweet, visit to a town hall, and contribution you make supporting Democratic senators sends a very powerful message that the American people are united in their opposition to this moral abomination.

[**Chip in $1 to support the Democratic senators leading the fight to protect Obamacare.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170506-Myers-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thank you for standing united with Democratic senators in this critical fight,

Mindy

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e75a/2b07114c/5253b6b8/736e9db5/4028015514/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e75a/2b07114c/5253b6b8/736e9db4/4028015514/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e75a/2b07114c/5253b6b8/736e9db7/4028015514/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
